checkin.journal:
Grateful for: The challenge of the speech, the day, cosita family friends ❤️❤️❤️, Scared, shitting my pants but still doing it, Glad to have Alex to help me relax
Today great: That I would do well my speech thats all I am hoping for.
Affirmation: I am so much more than it appears to be.
Amazing things: I delivered the speech relatively okey, this is what matters
Better: I should have talked a bit slow and I should have verified the speech, and perhaps I shouldn't stick to whatever fucking ChatGP
